message:
fix(tui): add semantic styling to search result rows and inspector panel (br-1xt0m.1.10.3)

Result rows now use styled spans: type badge [M]/[A]/[P]/[T] with
semantic colors, importance !! in critical/warning style, meta in muted,
title in primary. Inspector labels use consistent label+value styling
with "Importance:" (not "Import."), human-readable type names, and
severity-aware coloring for urgency and ack status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
